Package com.saperion.ws.wrapper

Class SaWsFieldDescription

java.lang.Object
com.saperion.ws.wrapper.SaWsFieldDescription
public class SaWsFieldDescription extends Object
This class wraps the SaFieldDescription class.
Author:
Daniel Manzke
